Question: Match the plant part with its function
Answer:
1) Root - a) Absorbs water and minerals, anchors plant
2) Stem - b) Supports plant, transports water and nutrients
3) Leaf - c) Photosynthesis, gas exchange
4) Flower - d) Reproduction
5) Fruit - e) Protects seeds, aids in dispersal
6) Seed - f) Embryo for new plant
7) Xylem - g) Transports water from roots to leaves
8) Phloem - h) Transports food from leaves to other parts
9) Petal - i) Attracts pollinators
10) Sepal - j) Protects flower bud
11) Stamen - k) Male reproductive part, produces pollen
12) Carpel/Pistil - l) Female reproductive part, contains ovary
13) Chloroplast - m) Site of photosynthesis
14) Stomata - n) Allows gas exchange
15) Cambium - o) Helps in secondary growth of stem
